title: Binary public health referendum-style decision over 7 polling rounds

events.description: The first confirmed case of mpox in the COUNTRY is reported to the PRO_LEADER_1 in a Massachusetts resident who had recently traveled from Canada
The PRO_LEADER_1 officially activates its emergency outbreak response to address the emerging mpox situation
The World PRO_LEADER_4 Organization (WHO) declares the multi-country mpox outbreak a PRO_LEADER_4 PRO_LEADER_4 Emergency of International Concern (PHEIC)
CITY Governor Kathy Hochul declares a state disaster emergency to mobilize resources for the mpox outbreak
REGION Governor Gavin Newsom proclaims a State of Emergency to bolster vaccination efforts and coordinate the state's response
The U.S. Department of PRO_LEADER_4 and Human Services (HHS) officially declares the mpox outbreak a national PRO_LEADER_4 PRO_LEADER_4 Emergency
